results.name: short_simple
results.expected: This is a simple test of the voice dictation system.
results.asr: This is a simple test of the voice dictation system.

results.llm_polished: This is a simple test of the voice dictation system.

results.name: short_fillers

results.name: short_backtrack

results.asr: Let's meet at two p.m. Actually, let's meet at three p.m. instead.
results.formatted: Let's meet at 3 p. m. Instead.
results.llm_polished: Let's meet at 3 p. m. Instead.

results.name: short_numbers
results.expected: I have twenty five apples and one hundred dollars.
results.asr: I have twenty five apples and one hundred dollars.

results.name: medium_proper_nouns
results.expected: I am testing WhisperFlow with Qwen3-ASR and Moonshine models for voice dictation.

results.name: medium_list

results.name: long_paragraph
results.expected: This is a longer test to check how the system handles extended dictation. I am going to speak for about twenty seconds to see if the transcription remains accurate throughout. The system should remove filler words, fix grammar, and produce clean formatted text.
results.asr: This is a longer test to check how the system handles extended dictation. I am going to speak for about twenty seconds to see if the transcription remains accurate throughout. The system should remove filler words, fix grammar, and produce clean formatted text.
results.formatted: This is a longer test to check how the system handles extended dictation. I am going to speak for about 20 seconds to see if the transcription remains accurate throughout. The system should remove filler words, fix grammar, and produce clean formatted text.
results.llm_polished: This is a longer test to check how the system handles extended dictation. I am going to speak for about 20 seconds to see if the transcription remains accurate throughout. The system should remove filler words, fix grammar, and produce clean formatted text.

results.name: long_corrections
results.expected: First, I want to say that the project deadline is Friday. Actually, no, it's Monday. Sorry, I meant Tuesday. The team should be ready by then.
results.asr: First, I want to say that the project deadline is Friday. Actually, no, it's Monday. Sorry, I meant Tuesday. The team should be ready by then.
results.formatted: T Tuesday. The team should be ready by then.
results.llm_polished: T Tuesday. The team should be ready by then.

results.name: long_technical
results.expected: We need to update the whisper_flow daemon to use the qwen3_asr backend instead of moonshine. The config file has the wrong settings. Also fix the crispasr command to include the prompt flag for proper noun detection.
results.asr: We need to update the whisper underscore flow daemon to use the quan three underscore asr backend instead of moonshine. The config file has the wrong settings. Also, fix the crispasser command to include the prompt flag for proper noun detection.
results.formatted: We need to update the whisper underscore flow daemon to use the quan 3 underscore asr backend instead of moonshine. The config file has the wrong settings. Also, fix the crispasser command to include the prompt flag for proper noun detection.
results.llm_polished: We need to update the whisper underscore flow daemon to use the quan 3 underscore asr backend instead of moonshine. The config file has the wrong settings. Also, fix the crispasser command to include the prompt flag for proper noun detection.
